deep_dive.title: Causal Inference for All: Marginal Estimands for Outcomes Truncated by Death
deep_dive.abstract: In longitudinal studies, outcomes of interest are often truncated by death, meaning that they are only observed or well-defined conditional on intercurrent events such as survival. Existing strategies face a trade-off: causally interpretable estimands, such as survivor average causal effects, target a latent subgroup, whereas while-alive and composite summaries apply to the full population but are difficult to interpret as causal effects on the non-mortality outcome. We address these challenges by introducing methodology for a new set of estimands that (i) concern the entire population, (ii) remain causally interpretable, and (iii) leverage the longitudinal data commonly available in studies with outcomes truncated by death. The set of estimands includes single-world marginal separable effects that generalize conditional separable effects to full-population summaries. We develop identification and estimation results for these estimands and apply the methodology in a reanalysis of a prostate cancer trial, highlighting how different estimands can yield different treatment conclusions.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: New causal estimands for outcomes truncated by death leveraging longitudinal data
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 针对死亡截断结果的新因果估计量，利用纵向数据
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 针对死亡截断结果的新因果估计量，利用纵向数据
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 针对死亡截断结果的新因果估计量，利用纵向数据
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper introduces a new class of causally interpretable marginal estimands for outcomes truncated by death in longitudinal studies, resolving the trade-off between latent subgroup and whole-population summaries.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对纵向研究中因死亡而截断的结果变量，提出了一类新的边际估计量。这些估计量既面向全人群保持因果可解释性，又充分利用纵向数据。与现有幸存者平均因果效应和存活状态复合指标相比，新方法避免了选择子群体或牺牲因果解释的缺陷，为生存分析中的因果推断提供了更全面的工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对纵向研究中因死亡而截断的结果变量，提出了一类新的边际估计量。这些估计量既面向全人群保持因果可解释性，又充分利用纵向数据。与现有幸存者平均因果效应和存活状态复合指标相比，新方法避免了选择子群体或牺牲因果解释的缺陷，为生存分析中的因果推断提供了更全面的工具。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: causal inference methods applied to machine learning tasks

quick_skim.title: Beyond But-for Test: Counterfactual Explanation in Abstract Argumentation via Actual Causality (Extended Version)
quick_skim.abstract: Counterfactual explanation in abstract argumentation calls for an answer to the what-if query: would the topic argument still be accepted if the status of certain other arguments were changed? Existing approaches are limited to the but-for test and fail to accommodate more refined counterfactual conditions. To overcome these limitations, we introduce an intervention-based counterfactual reasoning framework in abstract argumentation. Our approach encodes the acceptance conditions of arguments as equations, then defines an intervention operator that supports (1) changing sets of arguments simultaneously, and (2) fixing witness arguments to their actual labels. Guided by the refined counterfactual condition introduced in the Halpern-Pearl definition, our method goes beyond the but-for test, thereby correctly identifying causes in argumentation structures such as Preemption and Overdetermination. Through comparison, we show that our method surpasses prior methods in both expressiveness and reliability.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Intervention-based counterfactual reasoning in abstract argumentation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 抽象论证中基于干预的反事实推理
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 抽象论证中基于干预的反事实推理
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 抽象论证中基于干预的反事实推理
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper introduces an intervention-based counterfactual reasoning framework for abstract argumentation, encoding acceptance conditions as equations and defining an intervention operator that supports simultaneous changes and fixed witnesses.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对抽象论证中的反事实解释问题，提出了基于干预的反事实推理框架。通过将论证接受条件编码为方程，定义支持同时更改多论据和固定见证标签的干预算子，超越了传统的若非测试。该方法为论证系统的因果解释提供了更精细的工具，可应用于AI可解释性中的反事实推理。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对抽象论证中的反事实解释问题，提出了基于干预的反事实推理框架。通过将论证接受条件编码为方程，定义支持同时更改多论据和固定见证标签的干预算子，超越了传统的若非测试。该方法为论证系统的因果解释提供了更精细的工具，可应用于AI可解释性中的反事实推理。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: counterfactual reasoning in machine learning models

quick_skim.title: Measuring Opportunity Cost with Stock Lifetime Value
quick_skim.abstract: Measuring the long-term opportunity cost of interventions remains a critical challenge in e-commerce A/B testing. While strategic levers (such as dynamic pricing, ranking algorithms, and promotional campaigns) trigger shifts in consumer behaviour that persist over months, operational constraints necessitate fast decision-making cycles that are typically limited to weekly experimental windows. Standard metrics like revenue and conversion are inherently short-sighted, biasing decisions toward immediate gains. We introduce Stock Lifetime Value (SLV), a stock-centric metric that captures long-term opportunity cost within short experiments by aggregating expected profit from current inventory through the end of its selling lifecycle. We develop the methodology in the context of fashion e-commerce at Zalando, where stock constraints and seasonal lifecycles make the trade off between short-term and long-term outcomes particularly relevant. SLV aggregates the expected profit from current inventory through the end of its selling lifecycle, providing a way to evaluate interventions against their true profit impact. We discuss three applications: (a) SLV efficiency as a metric for article-level and customer-level A/B tests, validated against realized 18-month lifecycle outcomes; (b) SLV as an optimization target for pricing algorithms, aligning the metric used for measurement with the objective used for decision-making; and (c) a framework for annualizing treatment effects into financial reporting metrics required by business stakeholders. While our empirical setting is fashion retail, the framework applies broadly to any inventory-constrained environment where value decays over time or interventions shift demand across periods.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: measuring long-term opportunity cost of interventions in e-commerce A/B testing
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 测量电商A/B测试中干预措施的长期机会成本
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 测量电商A/B测试中干预措施的长期机会成本
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 测量电商A/B测试中干预措施的长期机会成本
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces Stock Lifetime Value (SLV), a metric to capture long-term opportunity cost within short experiments by aggregating expected profit from current inventory.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对电商A/B测试中短期指标无法反映长期机会成本的问题，提出了股票终身价值（SLV）指标。SLV通过聚合当前库存在其销售生命周期内的预期利润，在短实验中捕捉长期机会成本。该方法在模拟和真实数据上展示了其有效性，能够更准确地评估干预措施的长期影响。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对电商A/B测试中短期指标无法反映长期机会成本的问题，提出了股票终身价值（SLV）指标。SLV通过聚合当前库存在其销售生命周期内的预期利润，在短实验中捕捉长期机会成本。该方法在模拟和真实数据上展示了其有效性，能够更准确地评估干预措施的长期影响。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: causal inference methods for two sided market experiments
